macro.title: Citi Shares Decline as Return Target Falls Short of Expectations - Bloomberg.com
macro.summary: Citigroup Inc. set out fresh targets in a pitch to convince investors it can inch closer to its Wall Street rivals, after years of pushing to remedy regulators’ complaints and shed its laggard image.

macro.title: Used car prices fall for first time this year as gas prices spike, EV interest rises - CNBC
macro.summary: Cox Automotive reports affordability remains a key concern for buyers and that's driving increased demand for older vehicles as well as all-electric vehicles.
